overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy mountain forest at night in a video game. The camera moves along a dirt path past pine trees and rocky outcrops, with the moon providing backlight through the mist, eventually following a stream deeper into the woods.

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the ridge while panning across the foggy mountain valley

entered.detail: solitary tall pine tree silhouetted against the foggy background
deep fog-filled valley between mountain ridges
dense forest covering the distant mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy mountain overlook at night. A tall pine tree stands prominently in the center while the camera slowly pans across a misty valley. The terrain is grassy with dense forest visible on distant slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge path under bright moonlight

events.description: moon becomes visible as the camera turns, illuminating the path ahead with pale light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain ridge path toward the moon

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding along the mountain ridge
bright full moon glowing through the fog
steep rocky cliff face lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a mountain ridge path with the moon now visible in the sky, casting a pale light through the fog. Rocky cliffs line the left side while the path winds forward. The valley falls behind as the walk continues along the ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with large boulders

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with large boulders and cliff faces lining the path

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding rocky trail as the forest closes in around the path

entered.detail: jagged rock formation protruding from the mountainside
massive boulder sitting beside the trail
narrow stream visible in the distance reflecting moonlight

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more rugged and enclosed, with large boulders and rocky outcrops appearing alongside the path. The camera turns left slightly as it navigates the terrain, and a stream becomes visible in the distance, marking the approach to a water feature.

events.description: stream and waterfall come into view as the path follows the water upstream into denser forest

agents.ego_description: following the stream deeper into the dark forest, with water flowing alongside the path

entered.detail: cascading stream flowing down rocks alongside the path
thick pine forest closing in on both sides of the trail
overhead tree canopy blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: The path follows a moonlit stream into increasingly dense forest. The waterfall becomes the central focus as the camera moves alongside the flowing water. Tall pines surround the path, creating an enclosed, dark atmosphere with only the moon filtering through the canopy.

segments_warnings: segment[3]: entered 'dark_forest_canopy' 位置无效: 'all around'

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, misty mountain overlook into the secluded depths of a moonlit forest. It begins by panning across a foggy valley from a grassy vantage point dominated by a single tall pine tree. As the camera moves onto a ridge path, the valley recedes and the moon emerges in the sky, casting a pale glow over rocky cliffs that line the trail. The terrain then becomes more rugged and enclosed with large boulders, before the camera turns slightly to reveal a distant stream. Finally, the path follows the flowing water into a dense canopy of pines, where the atmosphere grows dark and the focus shifts to a moonlit waterfall.
